entry.title: NURME Balneological Peat Strenghtening Conditioner 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Conditioner
Price: 14.90

This 100% natural peat conditioner offers your hair the ultimate care by deeply moisturizing and strengthening it. Its unique ingredients help prevent breakage and split ends, leaving your hair soft, smooth, and healthy. Nurme’s peat conditioner restores your hair’s natural shine and elasticity, delivering perfect care with every wash. It is perfect for revitalizing dry and damaged hair, restoring essential moisture and vitality.

Key Ingredients:

  • Balneological Peat is rich in nutrients and minerals that nourish and strengthen hair ends. It helps restore elasticity and resilience, making hair more durable and vibrant.
  • Aloe Vera is renowned for its deeply hydrating and soothing properties. This natural ingredient keeps hair ends soft and silky, enhances shine, and reduces dryness.
  • Jojoba Oil is a natural moisturizer that deeply nourishes the hair and restores its natural moisture balance. It prevents breakage and split ends, giving hair strength and elasticity.
  • Coconut Oil nourishes hair deeply, improving its structure and promoting a healthier appearance. It smooths the hair and reduces dryness, leaving it soft and manageable.
  • Provitamin B5 penetrates the hair shaft, strengthening and restoring the hair from within. It reduces breakage and split ends while adding shine and making hair easy to comb.
  • Juniper Essential Oil enhances the natural shine and softness of hair. Its smoothing effect protects against external damage and keeps hair ends well-maintained. It also amplifies the benefits of peat.
How to use: Wash your hair thoroughly with Nurme Peat shampoo. Then apply a small amount of conditioner to clean hair ends and leave it on for 2–3 minutes. Rinse thoroughly with plenty of water. Allowing the conditioner to sit longer enhances its nourishing effects. The conditioner can also be massaged into the scalp for added hydration.

Ingredients: Aqua*, Cetearyl Alcohol**, Glycerin, Distearoylethyl Dimonium Chloride**, Betaine**, Peat*, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride**, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice*, Benzyl Alcohol**, Panthenol**, Dehydroacetic Acid**, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil*, Juniperus Communis (Juniper berry) Fruit Oil*, Tocopherol**, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Limonene***, Potassium Sorbate**, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid

* Natural origin
** Natural cosmetics approved ingredient
*** Occurs naturally in essential oil

entry.title: HOIA Natural Conditioner Rapuntsel 290ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Conditioner
Price: 29.90

Organic Conditioner contains lots on useful fatty acids that moisturize and nourish you hair. The hair conditior is enriched with rhamnoides extract which strengthens the hair and adds shine. Its rich complex of essential oils helps to stimulate hair growth and imporves blood circulation to the scalp.

Suitable for all hair types, this natural conditioner is free from parabens, silicones, sulfates, and synthetic preservatives, making it an excellent choice for those seeking gentle yet effective hair care.

How to use: Apply to wet hair, massaging gently from roots to ends. Leave it on for a few minutes, then rinse thoroughly. For intensive care, use it as a deep-conditioning hair mask by leaving it on longer before rinsing to provide extra nourishment and hydration.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetyl alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, *Cocos Nucifera oil, *Hippophae Rhanoides Extract, *Pelargonium Graveolens Flower oil, *Lavandula Angustifolia Flower oil, *Mentha Piperita Leaf oil, *Juniperus Communis Fruit oil, *Citrus Aurantifolia Flower oil, *Rosmarinus Officinails Leaf oil, *Cymbopogon Flexuosus Leaf oil, Tocopherol, Glyceryl stearate, Citric acid, Benzyl alcohol, Phenoxyethanol & Ethylhexylglycerin, **Citral, **Citronellol, **Geraniol, **Limonene, **Linalool.

*From organic farming

**Natural components of essential oils

entry.title: LUUV Natural Conditioner For Kids 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Conditioner
Price: 11.90

This enchanting conditioner deeply moisturizes, nourishes, and protects the hair, leaving it irresistibly shiny. LUUV children’s hair conditioner is certified with the prestigious ECOCERT/COSMOS eco-certificate.

Say goodbye to tangles and hello to effortlessly smooth and manageable hair! Conditioner strengthens hair from roots to ends, making it easy to comb and wonderfully lightweight. Infused with natural oils and betaine, it deeply moisturizes and enhances the overall health and beauty of the hair. And let’s not forget about that enchanting vanilla aroma! It’s derived from natural sources and is completely allergen-free. If your little one dreams of becoming the next Rapunzel with long, flowing locks, LUUV natural conditioner for kids is the perfect choice!

  • Natural and allergen-free
  • Sweet vanilla scent
  • Does not irritate skin
  • ECOCERT/COSMOS certified
  • Natural origin 98,72%

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan | certified

The product is made in Estonia

How to use:  Use the conditioner after shampoo and apply from the ends only. Let it sit and rinse! You can use the conditioner after every wash.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Lecithin, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Olus Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Betaine, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid, Aroma

entry.title: BEE IT Reconstruction Hair Mask 1000ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Conditioner
Price: 46.50

A concentrated repairing post shampoo mask which gratifies for its immediate effectiveness. Gives strength and elasticity, deeply hydrating and nourishing for a healthy, luminous and plumped up hair.

How to use: Apply after shampooing to towel-dried hair. Leave on for 5-10 minutes, then comb and rinse. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Behenamidopropyl dimethylamine, Cetearyl alcohol, Lactic acid, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Tocopheryl acetate, Sorbitol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Olea europaea fruit oil*, Opuntia ficus-indica seed oil, Glycerin, Myrtus communis extract, Panthenol, Hamamelis virginiana leaf extract*, Mel*, Propolis, Retinyl palmitate, Limonene, Linalool, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate.

*Organic

100% Natural Ingredients

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: BEE IT Reconstruction Hair Mask 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Shampoo
Price: 4.90

A concentrated repairing post shampoo mask which gratifies for its immediate effectiveness. Gives strength and elasticity, deeply hydrating and nourishing for a healthy, luminous and plumped up hair.

How to use: Apply after shampooing to towel-dried hair. Leave on for 5-10 minutes, then comb and rinse. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Behenamidopropyl dimethylamine, Cetearyl alcohol, Lactic acid, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Tocopheryl acetate, Sorbitol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Olea europaea fruit oil*, Opuntia ficus-indica seed oil, Glycerin, Myrtus communis extract, Panthenol, Hamamelis virginiana leaf extract*, Mel*, Propolis, Retinyl palmitate, Limonene, Linalool, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate.

*Organic

100% Natural Ingredients

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: Magrada Moisturizing Hair Mask with Rhubarb Extract Refill 500ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Conditioner
Price: 30.50

Voluminous, shiny, healthy – we have created a professional hair care collection for you to enjoy beautiful salon hair every day.

The gold medal-winning (Pure Beauty Global Awards 2021 Winner) hair mask is designed for intensive nurturing and moisturising of dry and damaged hair.

The rhubarb hair mask with castor oil and macadamia oil pampers, revives, and smooths damaged hair. The vitality of the plants has a balancing and nurturing effect. The natural care improves the hair structure and reduces damage, adding a captivating shine to the hair.

The silky, creamy composition will give the hair a spring-like freshness and the juicy aroma of rhubarb.

  • Thanks to its anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial properties, rhubarb root extract soothes a sensitive and irritated scalp.
  • Macadamia oil is rich in fatty acids and potassium, which will make your hair stronger and easier to comb. Macadamia oil contains antioxidants which help the hair to recover from damaging environmental impacts.
  • Castor oil has an anti-microbial effect, which helps to reduce dandruff and other scalp issues deteriorating hair health. The vitamin E in the oil moisturises hair roots and gives the hair a healthy shine.

How to use: Apply the mask on damp hair after shampooing, starting from the tips. Leave in for 5–15 minutes, then rinse with plenty of water.

Store at a temperature of 5 to 25 degrees. When storing, protect from direct sunlight. Do not store the product near heaters or other heat sources.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Macadamia Ternifolia (Macadamia) Seed Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Hydrolyzed Wheat Starch, Parfum, Butylene Glycol, Rheum Palmatum (Rhubarb) Root Extract, Triethanolamine, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin

Ingredients of natural origin: 94,16%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Hair Stimulating Conditioner with Linden Flower Extract Refill 500ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Conditioner
Price: 22.50

Enjoy midsummer moments all year round. This conditioner is characterised by a composition of efficient Nordic plants which supports and accelerates natural hair growth. The silky, creamy composition of the conditioner spreads evenly on the hair, leaving behind a slightly honey-like aroma – like a warm July night.

The Nordic birch extract moisturises and softens the hair, making it easy to comb. The organic aloe extract has an calming effect on the scalp and prevents drying of the tips. The composition of plant extracts gives the hair a healthy shine, protects it from heat treatment, and preserves the pigmentation of the hair follicles, helping the hair to remain lively and elastic. The light conditioner is suitable for the entire family for daily use.

  • Nordic linden flower extract has a moisturising and softening effect suitable for a sensitive or irritated scalp.
  • The organic Nordic birch extract stimulates the circulation in the scalp and strengthens the roots, thereby accelerating natural hair growth.
  • The organic aloe extract has a deeply calming and moisturising effect on the skin. Aloe is well-known for its rich vitamin A, C, and E, folic acid, and collagen content.

How to use: Apply the conditioner on your hair after shampooing, starting from the tips. Leave in for 2–3 minutes, then rinse with plenty of water. The conditioner is suitable for daily use.

Store at a temperature of 5 to 25 degrees. When storing, protect from direct sunlight. Do not store the product near heaters or other heat sources.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Glycerin, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Parfum, Cetyl Alcohol, Betula Alba (Birch) Leaf Exract*, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Extract*, Butylene Glycol, Alcohol, Tilia Cordata (Linden Flower) Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Geraniol

*COSMOS Certified Organic Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 92,77%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Moisturizing Hair Mask with Rhubarb Extract Travel Size 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Conditioner
Price: 10.90

Voluminous, shiny, healthy – we have created a professional hair care collection for you to enjoy beautiful salon hair every day.

The gold medal-winning (Pure Beauty Global Awards 2021 Winner) hair mask is designed for intensive nurturing and moisturising of dry and damaged hair.

The rhubarb hair mask with castor oil and macadamia oil pampers, revives, and smooths damaged hair. The vitality of the plants has a balancing and nurturing effect. The natural care improves the hair structure and reduces damage, adding a captivating shine to the hair.

The silky, creamy composition will give the hair a spring-like freshness and the juicy aroma of rhubarb.

  • Thanks to its anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial properties, rhubarb root extract soothes a sensitive and irritated scalp.
  • Macadamia oil is rich in fatty acids and potassium, which will make your hair stronger and easier to comb. Macadamia oil contains antioxidants which help the hair to recover from damaging environmental impacts.
  • Castor oil has an anti-microbial effect, which helps to reduce dandruff and other scalp issues deteriorating hair health. The vitamin E in the oil moisturises hair roots and gives the hair a healthy shine.

How to use: Apply the mask on damp hair after shampooing, starting from the tips. Leave in for 5–15 minutes, then rinse with plenty of water.

Store at a temperature of 5 to 25 degrees. When storing, protect from direct sunlight. Do not store the product near heaters or other heat sources.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Macadamia Ternifolia (Macadamia) Seed Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Hydrolyzed Wheat Starch, Parfum, Butylene Glycol, Rheum Palmatum (Rhubarb) Root Extract, Triethanolamine, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin

Ingredients of natural origin: 94,16%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

Enjoy midsummer moments all year round. This conditioner is characterised by a composition of efficient Nordic plants which supports and accelerates natural hair growth. The silky, creamy composition of the conditioner spreads evenly on the hair, leaving behind a slightly honey-like aroma – like a warm July night.

The Nordic birch extract moisturises and softens the hair, making it easy to comb. The organic aloe extract has an calming effect on the scalp and prevents drying of the tips. The composition of plant extracts gives the hair a healthy shine, protects it from heat treatment, and preserves the pigmentation of the hair follicles, helping the hair to remain lively and elastic. The light conditioner is suitable for the entire family for daily use.

  • Nordic linden flower extract has a moisturising and softening effect suitable for a sensitive or irritated scalp.
  • The organic Nordic birch extract stimulates the circulation in the scalp and strengthens the roots, thereby accelerating natural hair growth.
  • The organic aloe extract has a deeply calming and moisturising effect on the skin. Aloe is well-known for its rich vitamin A, C, and E, folic acid, and collagen content.

entry.title: LUUV Natural Kids Detangling Spray 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Conditioner
Price: 14.00

Certified with the globally recognized ECOCERT/COSMOS certification, this spray is a game-changer for your little one’s hair care routine. It’s time to say goodbye to stubborn tangles and hello to hassle-free styling!

LUUV Detangle spray is specially formulated to tame even the most stubborn knots, leaving your little one’s hair silky smooth, strong, and oh-so-shiny! And let’s not forget the delightful scent! Detangling spray comes with a mouthwatering juicy pear scent that kids absolutely adore. Plus, you can rest easy knowing that the scent is naturally derived and free from any allergens. Your little one’s hair is in good hands. And now that your little one’s hair is tangle-free, it’s time to explore a whole new world of hairstyles! From cute pigtails to stylish braids, this spray opens up endless possibilities for your child’s hair adventures.

  • Natural and allergen-free
  • Fresh pear scent
  • Does not irritate skin
  • ECOCERT/COSMOS certified
  • Natural origin 99,76%

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan | certified

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Shake the bottle before use. Spray the conditioner on the hair, let it work for a few moments and comb through the hair. Can be used both on wet hair after washing and on dry hair daily.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Lecithin, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Olus Oil, Propanediol, Betaine, Coconut Alkanes, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid, Aroma

entry.title: LUUV Natural Caring Conditioner With Plum Oil 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Conditioner
Price: 11.50

Maintained hair every day! Natural conditioner enriched with plum oil is perfect for daily use on all hair types. Cold-pressed plum oil moisturizes hair, restores hair ends and protects against heat treatment. The mixture of natural oils, proteins and active substances provides everything necessary for hair to be strong and shiny. Also suitable for colored hair.

  • suitable for all hair types, including dyed hair
  • caring and softening effect
  • moisturizes and protects hair
  • protects hair from heat treatment

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan | paraben free

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply the conditioner on your hair after shampooing, starting from the tips. Leave in for 2–3 minutes, then rinse with plenty of water.

Ingredients: Aqua, Distearoylethyl Dimonium Chloride, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Cetyl alcohol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Betaine, PCA Glyceryl Oleate, Prunus Domestica (Plum) Seed oil, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid, Cymbopogon Martini (Palmarosa) oil, Parfum, Geraniol

entry.title: LUUV Natural Volumizing Seabuckthorn Conditioner 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Conditioner
Price: 11.50

Natural sea buckthorn conditioner is suitable for normal/oily hair, it gives the hair softness, volume and shine. Sea buckthorn and castor oils strengthen the hair, help to prevent hair splitting and stimulate hair growth. Wheat protein makes the hair stronger and increases volume and elasticity. Provitamin B5 makes the hair easy to comb and protects from heat treatment. 

  • suitable for all hair types, including oily hair
  • gives hair fluffiness and shine
  • moisturizes and strengthens the hair
  • with a citrus scent

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan 

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply the conditioner on your hair after shampooing, starting from the tips. Leave in for 2–3 minutes, then rinse with plenty of water.

Ingredients: Aqua, Coco-Glucoside, Betaine, Citric Acid, Xanthan Gum, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea Buckthorn) oil, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, PCA Glyceryl Oleate, Citrus Reticulata (Mandarin oil), Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Oil, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Parfum, Limonene

entry.title: LUUV Natural Softening & Protecting Honey Conditioner 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Conditioner
Price: 11.50

Natural honey conditioner makes the hair soft and easy to comb, restoring damaged hair ends. Organic honey extract makes the hair silky and protects from environmental effects. Organic barley extract stimulates hair growth and gives shine. Wheat protein strengthens the hair and increases elasticity. Also suitable for colored hair.

  • suitable for all hair types, including dyed hair
  • with a softening and protective effect
  • gives hair softness
  • improves hair structure and strengthens hair
  • with a honey-sweet smell

natural | cruelty free | sustainable 

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply the conditioner on your hair after shampooing, starting from the tips. Leave in for 2–3 minutes, then rinse with plenty of water.

Ingredients: Aqua, Distearoylethyl Dimonium Chloride, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Cocos Nucifera, Cetyl alcohol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf juice, Betaine, Ricinus Communis Seed (Castor) Oil, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Propolis (Bee glue) extract, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Hordeum Vulgare (Barlay sprouts) Extract, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea Buckthorn) oil, PCA Glyceryl Oleate, Panthenol, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Coco-Glucoside, Glyceryl Oleate, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Parfum

entry.title: Blokzeep Conditioner Bar Avocado 60g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Blokzeep
Type: Conditioner
Price: 9.99

Specially for dry & damaged hair. The good fats in Avocado have many applications, including as a conditioner. The Avocado oil in this conditioner bar has a moisturizing effect on dry hair, giving it a beautiful shine. In addition to Avocado, this conditioner bar also contains Shea Butter and Mango Butter, two ingredients that are also known for their good properties. Shea Butter is rich in antioxidants that regulate the moisture balance of your skin and hair and therefore has a moisturizing and soothing effect. Mango butter has a similar structure to Shea Butter and also contains many antioxidants. It has a restorative effect and strengthens your hair roots. This combination of ingredients is ideal nutrition for your hair!

This Avocado conditioner bar is sustainable for three reasons:

  • Less water: A normal bottle of conditioner contains 80% water, which must be transported every time.
  • More efficient use: A conditioner block lasts 3 times as long as a normal bottle of conditioner 
  • Plastic-free packaging

This Conditioner bar Avocado is handmade within Europe and transported to the Netherlands in a CO2 neutral manner. Packaging is 100% plastic-free.

How to use: After washing your hair with a shampoo, massage the conditioner gently into wet ends and then rinse.

Ingredients: Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Glyceryl Stearate SE, Sea Salt, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Parfum, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Mangifera Indica Seed (Mango) Butter, Phenoxyethanol, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Benzyl Benzoate, Hexyl Cinnamal

natural ingredients | cruelty-free | handmade

entry.title: Blokzeep Conditioner Bar Olive 60g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Blokzeep
Type: Conditioner
Price: 9.99

Olive has been known for centuries as a fantastic conditioner for your hair. This powerful and natural ingredient, rich in fatty acids and antioxidant vitamin E, has an intensely nourishing and softening effect without weighing the hair. In addition to Olive, this conditioner bar also contains Shea Butter. This is rich in antioxidants that regulate the moisture balance of your skin and hair and thus has a moisturizing and soothing effect. This combination of ingredients is ideal nutrition for your hair!

This Olive conditioner bar is sustainable for three reasons:

  • Less water: A normal bottle of conditioner contains 80% water, which must be transported every time.
  • More efficient use: A conditioner block lasts 3 times as long as a normal bottle of shampoo.
  • Plastic-free packaging

This Conditioner bar Olive is handmade within Europe and transported to the Netherlands in a CO2 neutral manner. Packaging is 100% plastic-free.

How to use: After washing your hair with a shampoo, massage the conditioner gently into wet ends and then rinse.

Ingredients: Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glyceryl Stearate SE, Sea Salt, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Parfum, Mentha Piperita Extract, Calendula Officinalis Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Benzyl Benzoate, Linalool, Benzyl Salicylate, Limonene, Hydroxycitronellal, Citronellol

natural ingredients | cruelty-free | handmade

entry.title: Blokzeep Conditioner Bar Argan 60g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Blokzeep
Type: Conditioner
Price: 9.99

The Argan conditioner bar is especially for dry hair. Argan oil is a rich mix that includes fatty acids, antioxidants and vitamin E. This composition has the property of penetrating relatively deep into the hair, making the hair more flexible. In addition, linoleic acid is an important component in Argan oil, which creates a protective layer that makes your hair retain moisture better and make it shine. Finally, the antioxidants in Argan oil provide external protection.

This Argan conditioner bar is sustainable for three reasons:

  • Less water: A normal bottle of conditioner contains 80% water, which must be transported every time.
  • More efficient use: A conditioner block lasts 3 times as long as a normal bottle of conditioner. 
  • Plastic-free packaging

This Conditioner bar Argan is handmade within Europe and transported to the Netherlands in a CO2 neutral manner. Packaging is 100% plastic-free.

How to use: After washing your hair with a shampoo, massage the conditioner gently into wet ends and then rinse.

Ingredients: Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Glyceryl Stearate SE, Sea Salt, Theobroma Cacao Seed Butter, Parfum, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Mentha Piperita Leaf Extract, Tilia Cordata Extract, Аloe Barbadensis Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Linalool, Coumarin, Benzyl Alcohol, Limonene

natural ingredients | cruelty-free | handmade

entry.title: MÁDARA Gloss and Vibrancy conditioner 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Conditioner
Price: 14.90

Deeply nourish and strengthen the hair with this shine enhancing conditioner, formulated with Northern Birch and Cranberry. After use, hair becomes silky smooth, shinier and easier to style. Plus, this conditioner is packaged in a 60% post-consumer recycled tube to reduce the volume of new plastic packaging made each year!

How to use: ​​​Massage into wet, clean hair. Leave in for 1-3 minutes, then thoroughly with water. For best results use in combination with MÁDARA Gloss And Vibrancy Shampoo.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Betaine, Glycerin, Distearoylethyl Dimonium Chloride, Mica (CI 77019), D-panthenol (Provitamin B5), Lactic Acid, Benzyl Alcohol, Aroma, CI 77891 (Titanium Dioxide), Sodium Benzoate, Betula Alba (Birch) Leaf Extract, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Vaccinium Macrocarpon (Cranberry) Fruit Extract, Potassium Sorbate, Limonene, Linalool, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil

COSMOS ORGANIC certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA Colour and Shine conditioner 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Conditioner
Price: 14.90

Deeply nourish and protect treated and coloured hair with this colour preserving conditioner. Formulated with enriching Northern Linseed, Horse Chestnut and Plantain, it deeply nourishes and protects treated and coloured hair. Helps to smooth frizz and maintain vibrancy of hair colour for shinier, silky smooth and easier to style hair. Plus, this conditioner is packaged in a 60% post-consumer recycled tube to reduce the volume of new plastic packaging made each year!

How to use: Massage into wet, clean hair. Leave in for 1-3 minutes, then thoroughly with water. For best results use in combination with MÁDARA Colour And Shine Shampoo.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Betaine, Glycerin, Behentrimonium Chloride, D-panthenol (Provitamin B5), Mica (CI 77019), Lactic Acid, Benzyl Alcohol, Aroma, CI 77891 (Titanium Dioxide), Sodium Benzoate, Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed) Seed Extract, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Potassium Sorbate, Aesculus Hippocastanum (Horse Chestnut) Seed Extract, Plantago Major (Plantain) Leaf Extract, Limonene, Linalool, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil

COSMOS ORGANIC certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA Nourish and Repair conditioner 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Conditioner
Price: 14.90

Deeply nourish and repair dry, damaged hair with this rich and creamy conditioner. Formulated with Northern Nettle and Quince, it helps to prevent breakage and split ends for silkier and more healthy-looking hair.  Plus, this conditioner is packaged in a 60% post-consumer recycled tube to reduce the volume of new plastic packaging made each year!

How to use: ​​Massage into wet, clean hair. Leave in for 1-3 minutes, then rinse thoroughly with water. For best results use in combination with MÁDARA Nourish and Repair Shampoo.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, D-panthenol (Provitamin B5), Betaine, Glycerin, Behentrimonium Chloride, Distearoylethyl Dimonium Chloride, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Tocopherol, Mica (CI 77019), Lactic Acid, Benzyl Alcohol, Aroma, CI 77891 (Titanium Dioxide), Sodium Benzoate, Pyrus Cydonia (Quince) Fruit Extract, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Urtica Dioica (Nettle) Leaf Extract, Potassium Sorbate, Limonene, Linalool, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil

COSMOS ORGANIC certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA FEED Repair & Dry Rescue hair mask 180ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Hair Mask
Price: 23.90

Deeply nourish your hair with this exceptional oil blend and fungi-based restructure mask that also prevents fiber damage , preserves colour and softens the hair.  Strengthens the lipid matrix and improves protection against mechanical damage and heat appliance to ensure silky smooth high-shine hair for days.

How to use: ​​​​Apply to clean, damp hair lengths and ends. Leave in for 5–10 minutes and rinse out thoroughly.

Ingredients: Cantharellus cibarius (chanterelle) extract, Cetearyl Alcohol, Distearoylethyl Dimonium Chloride, Glycerin, Brassica Alcohol, PCA Glyceryl Oleate, Sodium PCA, Brassicyl Isoleucinate Esylate, Lactic Acid, Aroma, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Xylitylglucoside, Butylene Glycol, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Benzyl Alcohol, Anhydroxylitol, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Sodium Benzoate, Xylitol, Hydrolyzed Keratin, Potassium Sorbate, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Oenothera Biennis (Evening Primrose) Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Tocopherol, Crambe Maritima (Sea Kale) Leaf Extract, Leuconostoc/Radish Root Ferment Filtrate, Linalool, Limonene, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Juniperus Virginiana Oil, Benzyl Salicylate

COSMOS ORGANIC certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Conditioner 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Conditioner
Price: 32.00

Nourishing organic conditioner, specially designed to strengthen and moisturise damaged hair, leaving it soft and smooth.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), soy extract (invigorating), wheat germ oil (protecting), organic extracts of lavender (soothing), sage (strengthening) and mallow (moisturising).

Suitable for all hair types.

How to use: Apply after shampooing to wet hair. Massage gently into hair and on scalp. Rinse thoroughly.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Triticum Vulgare Germ Oil**, Polyglyceryl-3 Dicitrate/Stearate*, Cetyl Alcohol*, Glycerin**, Aqua*, Betaine*, Citric Acid*, Xanthan Gum*, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Tocopherol*, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Potassium Sorbate, Citronellol**/***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Geraniol**/***, Malva Sylvestris Flower Extract**, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract**, Glycine Soja Seed Extract*, Urtica Dioica Leaf Extract**, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Sodium Lactate*, Sodium Benzoate.

* from natural origin (99,8%)
** certified organic (88,9%)
*** from natural essential oils

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.

entry.title: HOIA Hydrating Hair Mist 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Conditioner
Price: 23.90

Pleasantly scented hydrating spray helps to keep hair healthy, strong and shiny. Spray contains locally sourced nettle extract and rice water to strengthen hair, plant-based keratin, deeply moisturizing hyaluronic acid and aloe, hair-softening seaweed extracts and plant hydrosols, nourishing oils and shine-enhancing essential oils.

How to use: Shake the bottle before use and spray an appropriate amount onto wet or dry hair. No need to rinse hair.

Ingredients: *Salvia Officinalis Distillate water, *Achillea Millefolium Distillate water, Oryza Sativa Seed water, Chodrus Crispus extract, Sargassum Fluitans/Natans extract, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Crambe Abyssinica Seed oil, *Nigella Sativa Seed oil, Saccharomyces Ferment, Lactobacillus Ferment, Hydronated Sodium Hyaluronate, Glycerin, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf juice, Sodium Levulinate, Urtica Dioica Plant extract, Pentylene Glycol, Sodium Anisate, *Lavandula Angustifolia oil, *Pelargonium Graveolens oil, Citric Acid. **Citral, **Geraniol, **Linalool, **Limonene, **Citronellol.

*Organic. **Natural components of essential oil

Handmade in Saaremaa

entry.title: Magrada Hair Stimulating Conditioner with Linden Flower Extract 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Conditioner
Price: 12.90

Enjoy midsummer moments all year round. This conditioner is characterised by a composition of efficient Nordic plants which supports and accelerates natural hair growth. The silky, creamy composition of the conditioner spreads evenly on the hair, leaving behind a slightly honey-like aroma – like a warm July night.

The Nordic birch extract moisturises and softens the hair, making it easy to comb. The organic aloe extract has an calming effect on the scalp and prevents drying of the tips. The composition of plant extracts gives the hair a healthy shine, protects it from heat treatment, and preserves the pigmentation of the hair follicles, helping the hair to remain lively and elastic. The light conditioner is suitable for the entire family for daily use.

  • Nordic linden flower extract has a moisturising and softening effect suitable for a sensitive or irritated scalp.
  • The organic Nordic birch extract stimulates the circulation in the scalp and strengthens the roots, thereby accelerating natural hair growth.
  • The organic aloe extract has a deeply calming and moisturising effect on the skin. Aloe is well-known for its rich vitamin A, C, and E, folic acid, and collagen content.

How to use: Apply the conditioner on your hair after shampooing, starting from the tips. Leave in for 2–3 minutes, then rinse with plenty of water. The conditioner is suitable for daily use.

Store at a temperature of 5 to 25 degrees. When storing, protect from direct sunlight. Do not store the product near heaters or other heat sources.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Glycerin, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Parfum, Cetyl Alcohol, Betula Alba (Birch) Leaf Exract*, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Extract*, Butylene Glycol, Alcohol, Tilia Cordata (Linden Flower) Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Geraniol

*COSMOS Certified Organic Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 92,77%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Moisturizing Hair Mask with Rhubarb Extract 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Conditioner
Price: 15.90

Voluminous, shiny, healthy – we have created a professional hair care collection for you to enjoy beautiful salon hair every day.

The gold medal-winning (Pure Beauty Global Awards 2021 Winner) hair mask is designed for intensive nurturing and moisturising of dry and damaged hair.

The rhubarb hair mask with castor oil and macadamia oil pampers, revives, and smooths damaged hair. The vitality of the plants has a balancing and nurturing effect. The natural care improves the hair structure and reduces damage, adding a captivating shine to the hair.

The silky, creamy composition will give the hair a spring-like freshness and the juicy aroma of rhubarb.

  • Thanks to its anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial properties, rhubarb root extract soothes a sensitive and irritated scalp.
  • Macadamia oil is rich in fatty acids and potassium, which will make your hair stronger and easier to comb. Macadamia oil contains antioxidants which help the hair to recover from damaging environmental impacts.
  • Castor oil has an anti-microbial effect, which helps to reduce dandruff and other scalp issues deteriorating hair health. The vitamin E in the oil moisturises hair roots and gives the hair a healthy shine.

How to use: Apply the mask on damp hair after shampooing, starting from the tips. Leave in for 5–15 minutes, then rinse with plenty of water.

Store at a temperature of 5 to 25 degrees. When storing, protect from direct sunlight. Do not store the product near heaters or other heat sources.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Macadamia Ternifolia (Macadamia) Seed Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Hydrolyzed Wheat Starch, Parfum, Butylene Glycol, Rheum Palmatum (Rhubarb) Root Extract, Triethanolamine, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin

Ingredients of natural origin: 94,16%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Volumizing Solid Conditioner With Linden Flower Extract 50g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Conditioner
Price: 13.90

Gentle on your hair and on the environment. The solid conditioner is eco-friendly and practical to take with you in your suitcase or workout bag.

The combination of the best natural ingredients restores and nourishes hair without making it heavy. Plant-based ingredients, such as linden flowers, cocoa butter, shea butter, and sweet almond oil, leave the hair soft and pliable with a hint of a sweet linden flower aroma reminding you of a warm midsummer night.

  • Nordic linden flower extract has a moisturising and softening effect suitable for a sensitive or irritated scalp.
  • Shea butter is extracted from the nuts of the shea tree, which is native to Africa. Shea butter softens and moisturises the skin and helps to maintain its moisture balance.
  • Cocoa butter contains plenty of essential fatty acids, which help to improve the protective function of the skin.
  • Pro-vitamin B5 adds healthy elasticity and shine to your tresses and improves the structure of processed hair.

How to use: After washing your hair with a shampoo, massage the conditioner gently into wet ends and then rinse.

Ingredients: Cetearyl Alcohol, Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Butter, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Parfum, Tilia Cordata (Linden) Flower Extract, Hexyl Cinnamal, Geraniol

Ingredients of natural origin: 99%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | SLS-free | alcohol-free| silicone-free | vegan | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients
